build.beforeDevCommand: wasm-pack build crates/cube_wasm --release --target web --out-dir ../../web/pkg --out-name cube_wasm || wasm-pack build ../crates/cube_wasm --release --target web --out-dir ../../web/pkg --out-name cube_wasm
build.beforeBuildCommand: wasm-pack build crates/cube_wasm --release --target web --out-dir ../../web/pkg --out-name cube_wasm || wasm-pack build ../crates/cube_wasm --release --target web --out-dir ../../web/pkg --out-name cube_wasm

security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; worker-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.longDescription: Generate scrambled N×N cubes and watch real Rust solvers (meet-in-the-middle, beam, island genetic) find verified solutions — plus a wall of evolutionary trials.
